chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1212 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For order on office objection No.01 & 02. 2. For hearing of CMA No.6192/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 27-03-2025 M/s. Ahmed Ali Hussain and Muhammad Aizaz Ahmed, advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Irfan Javed, Collector Exports. Mr. Zafar Hussain, advocate files Vakalatnama and parawise comments on behalf of respondents, which are taken on record. Pursuant to the last order, Mr. Irfan Javed, Collector Exports is present. He unequivocally states that the NTN of the petitioner shall be unblocked today. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of the learned Collector is appreciated. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
